acceptance_rule: A code-bearing MPP contract cannot request PASS unless CDR evidence is declared and Stage14 MPP/CDR binding can be satisfied.
external_basis: NIST SSDF: secure development reduces vulnerabilities and addresses root causes to prevent recurrence
OWASP Secure Coding Practices: validation, access control, error handling/logging, file management, general practices
inference_rule: If code_artifact_classes intersects code-bearing classes, stage_contains_code must be true and cdr_required must be true.
no_implicit_state_rule: Missing stage_contains_code is a DENY even when the stage appears non-code; contracts must make the declaration explicit.
purpose: Require every MPP stage contract to explicitly declare whether the stage contains code-bearing work and whether CDR is required.
rationale: Stage14 made CDR mandatory for code-bearing work; Stage15 prevents ambiguous stage contracts from hiding code-bearing work behind missing metadata.
